headline: Dow Tumbles Over 400 Points, Records Weekly Loss: Investor Sentiment Declines, Greed Index In ‘Fear’ Zone
summary: The CNN Money Fear & Greed Index declined, U.S. stocks closed lower, and weekly losses were recorded. The index remained in the Fear zone on Friday.

headline: Domino's, Steel Dynamics And 3 Stocks To Watch Heading Into Monday
summary: U.S. stock futures mixed, investors focusing on earnings reports from companies like Domino's Pizza, Steel Dynamics, Ames National, W.R. Berkley, and Crown Holdings
